basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) or Ph.D. in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Genetics, Stem Cell Biology, or a related discipline.
qualification.details: Master's degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) or Ph.D. in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Genetics, Stem Cell Biology, or a related discipline. Must have demonstrated hands-on experience (minimum 1 year) in any of the following: Human stem cell culture and maintenance, Stem cell reprogramming, Directed differentiation of stem cells into specialized cell types, CRISPR/Cas9-based gene editing and molecular cloning.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) or Ph.D. in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Genetics, Stem Cell Biology, or a related discipline. Must have demonstrated hands-on experience (minimum 1 year) in any of the following: Human stem cell culture and maintenance, Stem cell reprogramming, Directed differentiation of stem cells into specialized cell types, CRISPR/Cas9-based gene editing and molecular cloning.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Project Associate position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) or a Ph.D. in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, Genetics, Stem Cell Biology, or a related discipline.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate role at IIT Delhi will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 30,000/- plus HRA @ 27%.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Project Associate contract?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position is on a contractual basis for a duration of 1 year, which includes a three-month probation period.

faq.question: Q7. What specific experience is required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates need at least 1 year of hands-on experience in areas like human stem cell culture, stem cell reprogramming, directed differentiation, or CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing.

faq.question: Q8. How should I apply for the IIT Delhi Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.
